case_title: GARY BRIGGS VS. BRANT MCCOMBS et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIGGS, GARY AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOMBS, BRANT DESMOND MCCOMBS, LARRY MCCOMBS, VIRGINA MAGIC VALLEY EXPRESS UNITED CAB CO VOSKOBOYN, GENNADILY DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-14-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-15-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-30-2009
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-07-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT MCCOMBS, BRANT DESMOND MCCOMBS, LARRY MCCOMBS, VIRGINA MAGIC VALLEY EXPRESS
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED CAB CO VOSKOBOYN, GENNADILY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON JUL-07-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-14-2009 CONTINUED TO SEP-25-2009 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR DISMISSAL OF DOES 1-30. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-25-2009 CONTINUED TO NOV-13-2009 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR DISMISSAL OF DOES 1-30. NOTE: ONLY INDIVIDUAL DEFENDENTS WERE DISMISSED, NOT THE ENTIRE ACTION WHICH INCLUDES DOES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-13-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
